'''hotanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadworthy|roadworthy]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-t-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadworthy|roadworthy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hotanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hotanithi|hotanithi]] || [[word:hotaniji|hotaniji]] || [[word:hotanishi|hotanishi]] || [[word:hotaniki|hotaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hotanuthuthu|hotanuthuthu]] || [[word:hotanujuju|hotanujuju]] || [[word:hotanushushu|hotanushushu]] || [[word:hotanukuku|hotanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hotanuthu|hotanuthu]] || [[word:hotanuju|hotanuju]] || [[word:hotanushu|hotanushu]] || [[word:hotanuku|hotanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hotanufthuf|hotanufthuf]] || [[word:hotanufjuf|hotanufjuf]] || [[word:hotanufshuf|hotanufshuf]] || [[word:hotanufkuf|hotanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hotanethe|hotanethe]] || [[word:hotaneje|hotaneje]] || [[word:hotaneshe|hotaneshe]] || [[word:hotaneke|hotaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hotanothotho|hotanothotho]] || [[word:hotanojojo|hotanojojo]] || [[word:hotanoshosho|hotanoshosho]] || [[word:hotanokoko|hotanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hotanotho|hotanotho]] || [[word:hotanojo|hotanojo]] || [[word:hotanosho|hotanosho]] || [[word:hotanoko|hotanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hotanofthof|hotanofthof]] || [[word:hotanofjof|hotanofjof]] || [[word:hotanofshof|hotanofshof]] || [[word:hotanofkof|hotanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hotanÃŸfthÃŸf|hotanÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hotanÃŸfjÃŸf|hotanÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hotanÃŸfshÃŸf|hotanÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hotanÃŸfkÃŸf|hotanÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hotanÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|hotanÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hotanÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|hotanÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hotanÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|hotanÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hotanÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|hotanÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hotanÃŸfthÃŸf|hotanÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hotanÃŸfjÃŸf|hotanÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hotanÃŸfshÃŸf|hotanÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hotanÃŸfkÃŸf|hotanÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hotanÃŸfthÃŸf|hotanÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:hotanÃŸfjÃŸf|hotanÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:hotanÃŸfshÃŸf|hotanÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:hotanÃŸfkÃŸf|hotanÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hotanÃḊthÃḊ|hotanÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:hotanÃḊjÃḊ|hotanÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:hotanÃḊshÃḊ|hotanÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:hotanÃḊkÃḊ|hotanÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hotanathatha|hotanathatha]] || [[word:hotanajaja|hotanajaja]] || [[word:hotanashasha|hotanashasha]] || [[word:hotanakaka|hotanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hotanatha|hotanatha]] || [[word:hotanaja|hotanaja]] || [[word:hotanasha|hotanasha]] || [[word:hotanaka|hotanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hotanafthaf|hotanafthaf]] || [[word:hotanafjaf|hotanafjaf]] || [[word:hotanafshaf|hotanafshaf]] || [[word:hotanafkaf|hotanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hotanasha|hotanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hotanshÃḋsha|hotanshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hotanrosha|hotanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hotanmusha|hotanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hotanyasha|hotanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohotankshÃḋsha|gohotankshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohotankrosha|gohotankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohotankmusha|gohotankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohotankyasha|gohotankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hotatanasha|hotatanasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hotatanshÃḋsha|hotatanshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hotatanrosha|hotatanrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hotatanmusha|hotatanmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hotatanyasha|hotatanyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohotatankshÃḋsha|gohotatankshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohotatankrosha|gohotatankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohotatankmusha|gohotatankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohotatankyasha|gohotatankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hetÃḊnasha|hetÃḊnasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hetÃḊnshÃḋsha|hetÃḊnshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hetÃḊnrosha|hetÃḊnrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hetÃḊnmusha|hetÃḊnmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hetÃḊnyasha|hetÃḊnyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohetÃḊnkshÃḋsha|gohetÃḊnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohetÃḊnkrosha|gohetÃḊnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohetÃḊnkmusha|gohetÃḊnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohetÃḊnkyasha|gohetÃḊnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hotfanasha|hotfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hotfanshÃḋsha|hotfanshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hotfanrosha|hotfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hotfanmusha|hotfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hotfanyasha|hotfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohotfankshÃḋsha|gohotfankshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohotfankrosha|gohotfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohotfankmusha|gohotfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohotfankyasha|gohotfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|91d6f4e}}
